title: PrototypeBench Task Instance
description: Single benchmark task. Extends SWE-bench instances.jsonl with dual-test (backend pytest + frontend Playwright) fields.

pr_number.description: Merged PR number that this task is derived from.

base_commit.description: SHA of the PR's merge base — the state the agent starts from.

head_commit.description: SHA of the PR's merge commit — reference solution state.

problem_statement.description: Natural-language task description. Sourced from the closing issue body if available, else from PR description (with hints_text separated).

hints_text.description: Optional: reviewer/discussion text that may leak the solution. Excluded by default at agent eval time.

patch.description: Unified diff of the reference solution (non-test files only).

test_patch.description: Unified diff of the test file changes (combined backend + frontend). For split view see test_patch_backend/frontend.

test_patch_backend.description: Optional split: backend (pytest) test diff only.

test_patch_frontend.description: Optional split: frontend (Playwright) test diff only.

fail_to_pass.description: Tests that fail on base_commit and pass on head_commit. At least one of backend/frontend must be non-empty.

frontend.description: Playwright test IDs, e.g. 'frontend/tests/items.spec.ts:42:3 › Items › create item'.

pass_to_pass.description: Tests that pass on base_commit and must still pass on the agent's patch (regression guard).

stack_domain.description: Which side the reference patch touches. 'fullstack' = both.

uv_lock_sha.description: Content hash of uv.lock at base_commit.

bun_lock_sha.description: Content hash of bun.lockb at base_commit.

docker_compose_sha.description: Content hash of docker-compose.yml at base_commit.

setup_commit.description: Optional override commit for dependency/image setup if different from base_commit.

created_at.description: PR merge timestamp (ISO 8601). Used for contamination-tier assignment relative to model cutoffs.

contamination_tier.description: Public = pre-cutoff, usable openly. held_out = post-cutoff, rotated per leaderboard season. internal_only = excluded from public leaderboard.

difficulty.description: Post-curation label. Optional at creation time.

notes.description: Curator notes — known caveats, why this PR was included/flagged.

schema_version.description: Task schema version. Bump on breaking changes.
